operational_insights.title: Unexpected spike in cloud service costs
operational_insights.summary: Recent transactions indicate an increase in AWS charges, potentially due to increased resource allocation for a new project.
operational_insights.recommended_action: Review AWS usage and optimize resource allocation.
operational_insights.explanation: The last AWS transaction suggests higher than expected spending, warranting a review.

operational_insights.title: Increased sales trend
operational_insights.summary: Sales have shown a steady increase over the past month, largely influenced by new marketing strategies.
operational_insights.recommended_action: Monitor and continue current marketing efforts.
operational_insights.explanation: April sales reports indicate improving trends.

hidden_ground_truth.actual_intent: Combine operational emails and insights to evaluate recent trends in cloud service costs and sales performance.
expected_answer_facts: Recent AWS costs have increased significantly.
April sales trends show a positive trajectory.
